contract_summary: Service agreement between Northwind Digital and Clearwater Analytics for cloud data integration platform development, governed by MSA-2024-001.
provider_address: 88 King Street West, Suite 1400, Toronto, ON M5H 1A1
services_description: Design, development, and deployment of cloud-based data integration platform
contract_term: 12 months from the Effective Date with automatic 6-month renewals
scope_description: Northwind Digital Solutions will design, develop, and deploy a cloud-based data integration platform connecting Clearwater's portfolio management system with third-party market data feeds. This work is a continuation of the Phase 1 engagement and operates under the governing Master Services Agreement.
payment_terms: Monthly installments of $29,000.00 USD, due on the first business day of each month. Late payments subject to interest at 1.5% per month after a 10-day grace period.
